title.zh: 路由器固件二进制文件分析

description.zh: 记录路由器固件提取过程，包括DLink-DIR645和H3C-AM8000的固件分析与敏感信息泄露。
description.en: Documents router firmware extraction process, including DLink-DIR645 and H3C-AM8000 firmware analysis and sensitive information leakage.

content.zh: 分析路由器固件二进制文件

codeBlocks.code:
鉃?strings DIR645A1_FW102B08.bin | grep "hsqs"             

hsqs


鉃?hexdump -C DIR645A1_FW102B08.bin | grep -n "hsqs"

88066:00160090  68 73 71 73 a3 07 00 00  29 64 cc 4e 00 00 01 00  |hsqs....)d.N....|

鉃?dd if=DIR645A1_FW102B08.bin bs=1 count=100 skip=1441936 of=squash

100+0 records in

100+0 records out

100 bytes copied, 0.0387127 s, 2.6 kB/s


鉃?file squash 

squash: Squashfs filesystem, little endian, version 4.0, 5958022 bytes, 1955 inodes, blocksize: 65536 bytes, created: Wed Nov 23 03:10:33 2011

$ git clone https://github.com/mirror/firmware-mod-kit.git

$ sudo apt-get install build-essential zlib1g-dev liblzma-dev python-magic

$ cd firmware-mod-kit/src

$ ./configure && make

#杩欓噷椤轰究涓€鎻愶細ln: failed to create hard link 'uncomp_r.c' => 'uncomp.c': Operation not permitted

#鎶ラ敊鏄搷浣滀笉琚厑璁革紝鍥犱负鎴戝浘鐪佷簨瀹夸富鏈哄叡浜簡涓€涓枃浠跺す缁欒櫄鎷熸満锛宮ake鎿嶄綔閮芥槸鍦ㄥ叡浜枃浠跺す涓嬶紝瀵艰嚧鏉冮檺瀛樺湪闂

$ make clean

$ mv firmware-mod-kit/* ~/Desktop/firmware-mod-kit/ && cd firmware-mod-kit/src 

$ ./configure && make

#绱ф帴鐫€鐩存帴瀵筴ernel.squash杩涜瑙ｅ寘鍗冲彲

$ cd ../ && ./unsquashfs_all.sh ../kernel.squash

content.en: Tools preparation: VM Ubuntu 18, Binwalk, firmware-mod-kit

content.zh: 手动提取hsqs systemfiles：strings | grep检索文件系统magic签名头，hexdump查找偏移，dd提取文件
content.en: Manual hsqs systemfiles extraction: use strings | grep to find filesystem magic signature, hexdump for offset, dd for file extraction

content.zh: DIR-645敏感信息泄露：通过getcfg.php可获取设备配置信息，构造POC：curl -d 'SERVICES=DEVICE.ACCOUNT&attack=ture%0aAUTHORIZED_GROUP=1'
content.en: DIR-645 sensitive info leakage: Get device config via getcfg.php. POC: curl -d 'SERVICES=DEVICE.ACCOUNT&attack=ture%0aAUTHORIZED_GROUP=1'

content.zh: H3C-AM8000固件直接binwalk解包，发现shadow文件，通过john破解默认账号密码。
content.en: H3C-AM8000 firmware directly unpacked by binwalk, found shadow file, cracked default credentials with john.
